title: Light Romance Rice Stir-fry
description: A light and romantic Venezuelan dish featuring fragrant rice combined with aromatic herbs and a touch of smoke for an elegant twist on traditional dishes.
instructions: Preheat a wok or large skillet over medium heat. Add oil and swirl to coat.
Add red onion and garlic, sauté for about 2 minutes until softened.
Stir in thyme leaves and basil leaves, cooking for another minute.
Gradually add brown Basmati Rice along with a pinch of salt and pepper. Mix well with vegetables and herbs.
Simmer the mixture for about 5-7 minutes or until rice is tender and slightly fluffy, stirring occasionally to prevent sticking.
Serve hot as an accompaniment to your main dish.
